verdict.summary: 108 cells. Dev's only 2 rule-passing cells (fade down-gap>2% hold-to-close, all & liq_hi) were near-pure beta (strip_net +0.025/+0.253) and flipped hard on val (-1.83%/-1.76%, t=-3.4/-2.4). CS tercile fade LS (beta-neutral primary) never net-positive even on dev (costs 2 legs ~0.24-0.30% > gross <=0.18%). Control shows dev pattern is actually up-gap CONTINUATION, but >60% of it is market beta (strip -0.14 vs gross -0.51 at gt+1 o_close) and it inverts sub-windows on val. Weekend down-gap fade (dev +1.7%, t=2.6, n=30, strip +0.64; val +0.89, t=0.7, n=18) is exploratory-only, same-sign on val -> handed to Family B (owns weekend), NOT an A survivor.
verdict.handoff_to_B: weekend|lt-2|o_close fade: dev net +1.746 t=2.62 n=30 strip +0.640; val +0.889 t=0.74 n=18. n<100 exploratory, cannot promote here.
